narrative:
Jackson 24 (precinct in Stark County) has 634 registered voters, with 55.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.2%, a narrow Democratic lean of 0.2 percentage points.
